title: Auto-Create DTP Invoice on Stripe Invoice Events
description:
## Context

Billing and finance stakeholders need automatic record creation for every invoice generated by Stripe, tied to the subscription's Opportunity in Salesforce.

## Behavior

Create a Salesforce flow or trigger that listens for `invoice.created` events from the Stripe connector and automatically creates a DTP Invoice record. The invoice record should be linked to the corresponding subscription Opportunity for reporting and audit purposes.

## Trigger

When an `invoice.created` Stripe event is received in Salesforce (via the Stripe Connector installed in MBT-774), automatically create a DTP Invoice record (using the object from MBT-1026).
acceptance_criteria: DTP Invoice record is automatically created when an invoice.created Stripe event is received
Invoice record is populated with data from the Stripe event payload
Invoice record is linked to the corresponding subscription Opportunity
No manual intervention is required for invoice record creation
Flow works on sandbox and is ready for production deployment
middleware_changes: Salesforce flow or trigger that reacts to Stripe invoice.created events (received via the Stripe Connector) and automatically creates a DTP Invoice record with the event payload data, linked to the corresponding subscription Opportunity.
implementation_notes: Leverages the Stripe Connector for Salesforce (MBT-774) to receive events and the DTP Invoice object (MBT-1026) for storage. Implemented on the sandbox first.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed the flow was ready for review on the sandbox.
